options.reason: Confirmed active Flutter aesthetic path, but it runs three aesthetic models and local evidence shows an A-LAMP preprocessing mismatch.

options.option: Current ensemble but fix A-LAMP preprocessing mismatch
options.reason: Best backup if the app remains on the existing ensemble because it addresses a verified training-runtime preprocessing mismatch without retraining.

options.option: Retrain RGNet and A-LAMP on AVA
options.reason: AVA data exists and scripts can read CSV targets, but no local experiment proves improvement and current scalar outputs require normalized 0..1 AVA labels.

options.option: AVA pretrain then AADB fine-tune for RGNet/A-LAMP
options.reason: Potentially useful but train scripts do not expose resume/load-weights arguments in the inspected parser lines, so implementation work and controlled evaluation are required.

options.option: Add MUSIQ as a fourth aesthetic model
options.reason: MUSIQ code/checkpoints exist, but no MUSIQ TFLite export, verification, Flutter asset, or latency evidence was found.
Not locally supported because MUSIQ mobile export and runtime behavior are unproven.

options.option: Use MUSIQ only as teacher/offline evaluator
options.reason: A safer MUSIQ role because it avoids on-device TFLite risk, but teacher value still requires local benchmark evidence.

options.option: Use existing Stage 5 smaller student model
options.reason: Existing local handoff reports a 3.41 MB built-in-only TFLite artifact with strong local ranking/parity evidence; Flutter integration and target-device smoke testing are still required.

options.option: Keep KonIQ + FLIVE for technical quality unchanged
options.reason: Current technical models have local TFLite metadata/contracts and replacing them has no supporting local evidence.

options.option: Replace or retrain technical quality models
options.reason: No local audit evidence shows a technical-quality failure that justifies retraining or replacement before the aesthetic path is stabilized.

final_recommendation.primary: Use the existing Stage 5 aesthetic student model as the next mobile aesthetic model after Flutter integration and target-device smoke/latency testing; keep KonIQ + FLIVE unchanged for technical quality.
final_recommendation.backup: Keep the current NIMA + RGNet + A-LAMP ensemble, but fix A-LAMP preprocessing mismatch before using ensemble scores as the stable production path.
not_recommended_now: Add MUSIQ as an on-device Flutter model
Replace the aesthetic ensemble with MUSIQ
Retrain or replace the technical quality models without a new local benchmark
Claim AVA improves RGNet or A-LAMP before controlled local experiments
